mapper.sql: select id, tag_id, entity_type, entity_id, sort, create_time from portal_entity_tag
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into portal_entity_tag (tag_id, entity_type, entity_id, sort, create_time) values
(#{item.tagId}, #{item.entityType}, #{item.entityId}, #{item.sort, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete: delete from portal_entity_tag where entity_type = #{entityType} and entity_id = #{entityId}
mapper.select: where entity_type = #{entityType} and entity_id = #{entityId} order by sort asc, id asc
where tag_id = #{tagId} order by entity_type asc, id asc
